review_comment:
If the client requests 0 width and opposing anchors we still need to honor the margin, so we can't drop this.

I'm thinking the cases should really be "if width == 0" and "if left else if right". wlroots guarantees width == 0 implies both horizontal anchors by enforcing the protocol.
Oh right, width = 0 means as wide as possible. I re added it and changed the check to `width = 0` (moving the width changing below).
